title: Good morning,
content:
Good morning,

I've been struggling with bathroom issues since the early hours of the morning and they're continuing. Along with sluggishness from new medication, as mentioned in my previous email. I do not believe I will make it to the office today and apologize.

As we discussed in our temporary work arrangement, Tuesdays and Fridays were the days offered by management to work offsite. However, my condition is unpredictable and flexibility would ease some symptoms and lead closer in the direction of the accommodations I'm requesting.

Dr. Z, if you can please so kind as to provide the necessary deliverables by the EOD, I'll do by my best to complete them by this evening.

I appreciate your kindness and understanding,
Anthony
